name: requests-platform
description: Plataforma interna de requisiciones de material gastable.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "cross-env PORT=4100 npm run dev:backend" "cross-env VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:4100/api VITE_SOCKET_URL=http://localhost:4100 npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run audit:security
